CSS.ForbiddenProperties TYPE: lookup VERSION: 4.2.0 DEFAULT: array() --DESCRIPTION-- <p> This is the logical inverse of %CSS.AllowedProperties, and it will override that directive or any other directive. If possible, %CSS.AllowedProperties is recommended over this directive, because it can sometimes be difficult to tell whether or not you've forbidden all of the CSS properties you truly would like to disallow. </p> --# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
